# Module 4.6 — Deploy notes (Static Web Apps)

## Azure setup
- [ ] Created Static Web App: `kingdom-_______`
- [ ] Plan: Free
- [ ] Source: GitHub → repo + branch `main`
- [ ] App location: `web-vite/`
- [ ] Output location: `dist/`
- [ ] Live URL: `https://_______.azurestaticapps.net`

## Auto-generated workflow
- [ ] `.github/workflows/azure-static-web-apps-*.yml` created by Azure
- [ ] First push triggered build + deploy successfully

## API CORS
- [ ] Added SWA URL to `WithOrigins(...)`
- [ ] `AllowCredentials()` set
- [ ] `AllowAnyOrigin()` removed (incompatible with credentials)

## Frontend env vars
- [ ] `web-vite/.env.development` set to local API
- [ ] `web-vite/.env.production` set to prod API

## Smoke test
- [ ] Open SWA URL in incognito window
- [ ] Sign in via Google
- [ ] See kingdom list
